title: cymbalaria microcalyx
intro: Cymbalaria microcalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as the alpine marjoram or small marjoram. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cymbalaria microcalyx include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin problems.
